programme.title: 凤凰聚焦
programme.desc: 《凤凰聚焦》锁定全球和本地重大的时政话题、社会事件及新闻热点，选题超越地域界限，原创性挖掘事件的背景与真相，配以记者的现场调查，梳理来龙去脉，以高清的新闻镜片，摸清看透热点大事，充份展现凤凰团队深挖时事议题的功力。

programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: Where Ark Thou?
programme.desc: In the Bible, there are two Arks, each designed by God himself. Both the Ark of the Covenant and Noah's Ark were built to protect but lost to history. Did either exist, and if so, where could they be?

programme.title: Wolfemen Vs. The Automatons
programme.desc: The competitive pinball-wizard Wolfe brothers meet coin-op king Dirk at his giant poultry barn turned private arcade. Mike and Robbie enter a hangar full of ultra-rare games and choice carnival relics.

programme.title: Sushi
programme.desc: The sushi episode delves into the story of one of Japan's most popular dishes. The episode examines the history of sushi, from its humble beginning as a method of preserving fish.

programme.title: Tempura
programme.desc: The episode examines the history of tempura from Nagasaki tempura, the prototype of today's tempura derived from fritters brought to Japan by 16th-century Portuguese/Spanish traders and missionaries.

programme.desc: In this episode we follow one of our martial artists as he goes through a grueling tournament and how he uses technology to help him prepare for it.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Joe Calzaghe vs. Roy Jones, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light heavyweight championship fight featuring Joe Calzaghe and Roy Jones, Jr. This epic bout would prove to be the last of Calzage's career. Many wanted him to retire because he had nothing left to prove, and Calzaghe would officially do so 3 months later. Also on the card, Chris Arreola shows everyone why he is a heavyweight contender.

programme.title: Osaka, Japan: Show 4
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4 features Abi, Kakuryu, Hakuho and Shodaii from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Hague Grand Prix
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Hague Grand Prix and we follow some of Netherlands' judo heroes as they try to mark the event with a medal tally to be proud of.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 1 of 4.

programme.title: FS MMA Bill Mahood vs. Khalil Ibrahim
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! In this episode from St. Petersburg, Russia, Khalil Ibrahim throws a flurry of fists against Bill Mahood in a three round fight.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Jan Zaveck vs. Andre Berto
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features the IBF Welterweight title bout, Jan Zaveck, aka 'Mr. Sympathicus', (31-1, 18 KOs) vs. Andre Berto (27-1, 21 KOs) from Beau Rivage Resort and Casino in Biloxi, Mississippi, USA, on September 3, 2011. Andre Berto, coming off losing the WBC title to Victor Ortiz, was looking for vengeance against Zaveck.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Joe Calzaghe vs. Roy Jones, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light heavyweight championship fight featuring Joe Calzaghe and Roy Jones, Jr. This epic bout would prove to be the last of Calzage's career. Many wanted him to retire because he had nothing left to prove, and Calzaghe would officially do so 3 months later. Also on the card, Chris Arreola shows everyone why he is a heavyweight contender.

programme.title: Osaka, Japan: Show 4
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4 features Abi, Kakuryu, Hakuho and Shodaii from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Hague Grand Prix
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Hague Grand Prix and we follow some of Netherlands' judo heroes as they try to mark the event with a medal tally to be proud of.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 1 of 4.

programme.title: FS MMA Bill Mahood vs. Khalil Ibrahim
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! In this episode from St. Petersburg, Russia, Khalil Ibrahim throws a flurry of fists against Bill Mahood in a three round fight.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Jan Zaveck vs. Andre Berto
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features the IBF Welterweight title bout, Jan Zaveck, aka 'Mr. Sympathicus', (31-1, 18 KOs) vs. Andre Berto (27-1, 21 KOs) from Beau Rivage Resort and Casino in Biloxi, Mississippi, USA, on September 3, 2011. Andre Berto, coming off losing the WBC title to Victor Ortiz, was looking for vengeance against Zaveck.

programme.title: Biomechanics of Body Preparation
programme.desc: In this episode we follow one of our martial artists as he goes through a grueling tournament and how he uses technology to help him prepare for it.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Joe Calzaghe vs. Roy Jones, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light heavyweight championship fight featuring Joe Calzaghe and Roy Jones, Jr. This epic bout would prove to be the last of Calzage's career. Many wanted him to retire because he had nothing left to prove, and Calzaghe would officially do so 3 months later. Also on the card, Chris Arreola shows everyone why he is a heavyweight contender.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston

Episode 1 of 4.

programme.title: FS MMA Bill Mahood vs. Khalil Ibrahim
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! In this episode from St. Petersburg, Russia, Khalil Ibrahim throws a flurry of fists against Bill Mahood in a three round fight.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jean Pascal vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a Light Heavyweight Unification battle as WBO Champion Jean Pascal (25-1, 16 KOs) takes on undefeated IBO Champion, Chad Dawson, (29-0, 17 KOs) on August 14, 2010 at the Bell Centre in Montreal, Quebec, Canada. The fight ends in a decision after a controverial headbutt.

programme.title: Mega Fights In 60 Joel Julio vs.James Kirkland
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a Super Welterweight, 10 Round contest featuring Joel Julio (34-2, 31 KOs) vs.undefeated James Kirkland, aka 'Mandingo Warrior' (24-0, 21 KOs) from the HP Pavilion in San Jose, California, USA on March 3, 2009.

programme.title: In Kerala, India
programme.desc: Episode 12: Kerala, India - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Kalarippayattu and the Martial Art of Sword, Shield, Sticks, Open Hand and Kicks with Master Sureshan Nambiar.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Keith Thurman vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the undefeated Keith Thurman taking on Carlos Quintana. Also on the card, kickboxing super heavyweight legend Daniel Ghita faces off against Brice Guidon.

programme.title: Osaka, Japan: Show 5
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 features Hakuho, Aoiyama, Asanoyama and Kakuryu from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Fukuoka 2023 - Episode 2
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 2 of 4.

programme.title: Steam Team to the Rescue
programme.desc: Thomas and the steam trains spring into action when Porter and the diesel engines run into a series of accidents that throw their deliveries off track.

programme.title: Snow
programme.desc: It has snowed and almost no one can get about. Stanley builds a snow plough out of surf boards to clear the streets and makes a huge snow hill so that his friends can sledge down it.

programme.title: Art Park
programme.desc: Fifi and Fred help Stanley clear the park after a storm so it's ready for an Art Competition. The children use the recycled rubbish they found to make their pieces.

programme.title: My Dad Calls My Mum a Badger
programme.desc: Kisses, cuddles, and making renewable energy from cow poo! Parents are brilliant!

programme.title: It's time to make up a story
programme.desc: When JoJo can't find her favourite Captain Chloe storybook, Gran Gran suggests they make up their own story.

programme.title: Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: Promises
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Omelette
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: The Day Off Badge
programme.desc: It's Duggee's day off but the Squirrels show up to tell him about their adventures.

programme.title: The Duck Badge
programme.desc: The clubhouse is inundated with stray ducklings who think Norrie is their mum.

programme.title: Song of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Svalbard Global Seed Vault, Norway
programme.desc: Ubercorn and Glitch head to the Svalbard Global Seed Vault. But, just like when they were cadets together, the two of them get into trouble.

programme.title: Apple
programme.desc: Apple sings in celebration of her great-great-grandad, Apple Tree's, 100th birthday.

programme.title: Broccoli
programme.desc: It's Broccoli and his floret, Broc, performing their phenomenal ventriloquist act.

programme.title: The Tato Team
programme.desc: During the Veggies' Super Sidekick Costume Contest, Evil Pea traps Supertato in a jar of honey. All is lost until the Veggies become real super sidekicks, the Tato Team!

programme.title: Speedy Pea
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Supertato's brand new Tato Car but doesn't realise that the Grape Kids are in the back seat. Supertato has to get the Grape Kids back to safety and save his car.

programme.title: Treasure Trail
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa‐Laa and Po follow a trail of flowers which leads them to some very special treasure.

programme.title: Zebra
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'zebra' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We meet a striped zebra, a spiky hair zebra, a lazing zebra, a zooming zebra and a baby zebra.

programme.title: Micro OKIDO
programme.desc: Zim and Zam have discovered the lost city of Micro OKIDO.

programme.title: Pigs Might Fly
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo are great at picking apples with Mojo's crane top. But Preston's drone might be even better... until it accidentally scoops up Felix. Mojo and Bo are on the chase!

programme.title: Curry Quest
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: The Face Painting Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.title: The Carrot Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Geo Challenge
programme.desc: The Go Jetters test their knowledge and teamwork in a tricky maze full of trials. But can they escape the labyrinth, beat Glitch's high score and still keep the team together?

programme.title: Hospital
programme.desc: Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious x-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy!

programme.title: Squash
programme.desc: When dad and Uncle Stripe play a game of squash, Bluey and Bingo are in control of their every move, and Bingo proves that big siblings don't always beat little siblings.

programme.title: Driving
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Andy and the Baby Dusky Leaf Monkey
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Malaysia, South East Asia on a baby animal mission to find out why new born dusky leaf monkeys look so different to their parents.

programme.title: Towel
programme.desc: Bella plays funny games with Lift using her colourful towel. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who uses a big towel to make up a new dance - the Butterfly Boogie!

programme.title: The Harvest Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is getting ready to harvest the ripe crops that grown. The squirrels remember when they planted their seeds, watered them, and left them to grow, and now it's time to help Duggee pick them all.

programme.title: The Space Badge
programme.desc: Duggee teaches the squirrels all about the stars, the planets and the Milky Way!

programme.title: The Spooky Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing dress up when they hear a ghostly sound. What is going on?

programme.title: Wimbledon, England
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are at Centre Court in Wimbledon to watch the world's most famous tennis tournament.

programme.title: Great Mosque of Djenne, Africa
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch is invited to Djenne in Mali, Africa, to visit the people and to see one of his favourite things at work - mud.

programme.title: Emily's Best Friend
programme.desc: Emily worries that she doesn't have a best friend. Soon she realises she's been surrounded by best friends all along.

programme.title: Music Fixer
programme.desc: Sarah's Tuba is making some very peculiar sounds, so a trip to the Music Shop is in order.

programme.title: Wool on Wheels
programme.desc: Scarf Lady is holding a 'knitted treats' sale in the park, but the weather is causing a problem...

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Stanley needs to do some jobs for the community, but all his vehicles are out of power due to a cloud of butterflies obscuring them and he needs to figure out how to move them.

programme.title: I'm Going To Cannonball In The Pool
programme.desc: Water fights, bodyboarding and ice cream. The funny little animals chat about going on holiday.

programme.title: It's time to grow a flower
programme.desc: JoJo tries to grow a daffodil but is disheartened to learn that it will take a long time to bloom. Cynthia and Gran Gran show JoJo how to take care of it and the best way to measure its growth.

programme.title: Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a chameleon called Cosey and learn about blending into surroundings.

programme.title: The Day Off Badge
programme.desc: It's Duggee's day off but the Squirrels show up to tell him about their adventures.

programme.desc: It has snowed and almost no one can get about. Stanley builds a snow plough out of surf boards to clear the streets and makes a huge snow hill so that his friends can sledge down it.

programme.title: I'm Going To Cannonball In The Pool
programme.desc: Water fights, bodyboarding and ice cream. The funny little animals chat about going on holiday.

programme.title: It's time to grow a flower
programme.desc: JoJo tries to grow a daffodil but is disheartened to learn that it will take a long time to bloom. Cynthia and Gran Gran show JoJo how to take care of it and the best way to measure its growth.

programme.title: Promises
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Omelette
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: The Camouflage Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a chameleon called Cosey and learn about blending into surroundings.

programme.desc: It's Duggee's day off but the Squirrels show up to tell him about their adventures.

programme.title: Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Shopping Shenanigans, Istanbul, Turkey
programme.desc: Glitch's wishes cause underground trouble in Istanbul - an ancient ceiling may collapse!

programme.title: Fig
programme.desc: It's the nicest, kindest, Fig, performing his song, "Just Can't Help Being Sweet!"

programme.title: Apple
programme.desc: Apple sings in celebration of her great-great-grandad, Apple Tree's, 100th birthday.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Rediscovering China
programme.desc: Rediscovering China is a half-hour documentary program on CGTN. Each edition offers unique insight into various aspects of life in China today. With unrivalled access to the country's people and places, the program aims to show the global audience an inclusive and vigorous China._x000D__x000D_

programme.title: The Heat

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. Analysts bring Asian perspective to topical and developing issues. Asia Today also emphasizes the diverse cultures and lifestyles of the world’s most populous continent.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend working aboard a yacht in the South Pacific. As her first voyage sets sail, she falls for entrepreneur Mark.

programme.title: Girl In The Attic
programme.desc: To honour her mother's memory, Kelsey decides to run a marathon and shares her journey online to raise money. However, her public posts catch the attention of Billy, a seemingly unassuming store worker.

programme.title: Everything Bagel Galette & Upside Down Banana Bread
programme.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programme.title: Chicken Piccata With Lemon Risotto
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a beloved family meal of chicken piccata and lemon risotto using locally sourced Italian wine, lemons, and herbs.

programme.title: Lasagna Alla Bolognese
programme.desc: Everyone loves lasagna, and Rachael shares her tips for making a delicious, authentic dish made with egg pasta and guanciale, layered with marinara and bechamel sauce.

programme.title: Holiday Lasagne
programme.desc: What is red, white and green all over? It's Rachael Ray's lasagne! Rachael shows how to make delicious lasagne by layering sheets of pasta with cime di rapa, ricotta and a ragu sauce.
On their final night in Mongolia, the Earth-Cleaning Bros reflect under a sky full of stars - no signal, no power, just nature. But peace turns to panic as temperatures drop to - 10°C.

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up

programme.desc: After months of investigation, Abby becomes convinced that she's found her daughter's abductor. With the authorities dismissing her as a grief-stricken mother, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.desc: The Fly Team works to locate missing aid workers and the people who kidnapped them.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: After a prison transport van overturns, Hondo and the team hunt down three female fugitives, including a serial killer on the verge of a rampage. Also, with Annie's return to work, Deacon struggles to maintain a work life balance, and Luca does his best to teach Kelly to drive.

programme.title: Tara And Jessica's High School Reunion / Cat Lady
programme.desc: Longtime best friends, Tara and Jessica, want to rule their 30th high school reunion; Andi wants to know if her cat BoBo loves her as much as she loves him; Roarke juggles a secret romance.

programme.title: Who's Your Caddy?

programme.title: Lost In Translation

programme.title: Last Call
programme.desc: After the shocking shooting of a member of 20-Squad, Hondo and the team launch a citywide manhunt for the robbery crew responsible. Meanwhile, Deacon's plans for his future hit a snag, and Powell and Alfaro clash over a tricky issue.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: Speed
programme.desc: John and Celina find themselves in a hostage situation while undercover for a public safety initiative. While Angela and Nyla investigate the suspects, Tim challenges Lucy's decision-making skills.

programme.title: Keen As A Bean
programme.desc: Wes' former colleague Tyler Booth enlists the Fly Team's assistance.

programme.title: The Bandit
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. programme.desc: Chelsea have lost, and failed to score, in each of their last five Premier League games; they haven’t lost six in a row since November 1993, while they’ve never lost six in succession without scoring in their league history.

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: TITIP RINDU BUAT TUKANG CUKUR
programme.desc: Isah (Andi Viola) is a humble barber who considers herself plain and overweight, while her sister Sofi is a stunning beauty. Despite their differences, both sisters find themselves falling for the same man, Bayu (Qausar Harta). Surprisingly, it's the quirky Isah who seems to attract all the attention.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Manis Manis Bau Amis Tapi Suka
programme.desc: Celine (Hana Saraswati) faces a family curse if she refuses to take over her grandmother's fish restaurant. Despite her severe fish phobia, she flees and nearly crashes into Dion (Marcel Chandrawinata), who is carrying a block of fish. The next day, Celine wakes up reeking of raw fish, causing everyone around her to stay far away.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Mencari Tahu Isi Hati Cewek Gorengan
programme.desc: Rizky (Hardi Fadhillah) is forced into a shotgun wedding with Syifa (Jennifer Eve) due to a ridiculous misunderstanding: he accidentally entered the ladies' room and was accused of being a pervert. To make matters more 'fragrant,' Syifa is a fried-food vendor with a peculiar habit of farting whenever she pleases

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Salam Santun Akang Satpam Skin Oppa
programme.desc: Prita (Larasati Nugroho) is a Betawi girl obsessed with everything K-Pop. When she meets Jaka (Farhan Rasyid), who has an oriental look, she immediately calls him 'Oppa' and dreams of marrying him. However, her father has other plans, insisting she marry the local guy, Roni (Angga Putra).

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Dosen Ganteng Bikin Hati Adalah Mawut
programme.desc: Kinara (Amanda Salmakhira) is a typical college student with a loyal boyfriend by her side. Her world is shaken when a handsome new lecturer (Mahdy Reza) joins her campus. While Kinara initially feels nothing for him, she is shocked to discover that her parents have already arranged for her to marry the young professor.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: BUKAN MAIN, NENG KUE CUBIT TAJIR MENDADAK
programme.desc: Choosing a life of simplicity with her father, Yulina must learn to find happiness while selling kue cubit (traditional bite-sized cakes) on the street. Can she find contentment in the little things despite her struggles?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ganteng Sih Tapi Sayang Udah Makan Belum?
programme.desc: Bella (Ochi Rosdiana), a wealthy and beautiful girl, steps out of an ATM only to be knocked over by Ahong (El Ryan Carlen), who is sprinting away from a persistent admirer named Wina. Bella is furious and berates him, but Ahong doesn't look back, leaving Bella fuming in the street.

programme.title: Choco-Coco
programme.desc: Grizzy wakes up starving, and there is no chocolate spread!

programme.title: Cyber Sweetheart

programme.title: Smitten With The Kitten

programme.title: Robinput/Soccer Punch/In The Gut & Reverse

programme.desc: When Alan ditches Gumball to do something more fun, Gumball is desperate to track him down and make him pay for his betrayal.

programme.title: Dog King Clarence/Trampoline
programme.desc: Clarence's neighbor Gale recruits him to dog sit for her.

programme.title: The Father/The Cringe/The Neighbor/The Pact/The Faith
programme.desc: Richard and Frankie try to make amends in their father-son relationship.

programme.title: Lemming On Canvas
programme.desc: The Lemmings paint themselves alongside the noblemen.

programme.title: Bean The Pet Groomer/A Day In Bed
programme.desc: Mr Bean sets up a pet grooming business.

programme.title: Birthday Grifts
programme.desc: Elmer throws a birthday party.

programme.title: The Factory/The Revolt/The Mess/The Possession/The Heart
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin save the day at the Rainbow Factory.

programme.title: Too Old/Earth & Water/The Vault/The Box Prince/Dungeon Train
programme.desc: Finn, Jake and Princess Bubblegum discover a talented mutant named Lemonhope at the Pageant of Mutants. Now they must find a way to free him from the Lemongrabs.

programme.title: The Good Lars/Are You My Dad?/I Am My Mom
programme.desc: Steven, Lars and Sadie get invited to a party with the Cool Kids.

programme.title: 420 IPC
programme.desc: CA Keswani is arrested for bank fraud and forgery. Keswani hires Birbal, a lawyer, to fight his case, but Birbal realises that there's more to it than meets the eye. Release Year: 2021 Director: Manish Gupta

programme.title: Aakhree Raasta
programme.desc: Released from prison after 24 years for a crime he did not commit, David discovers that the people who framed him are now prominent citizens. Release Year: 1986 Director: Bhagyaraj

programme.title: Phobia
programme.desc: Traumatized artist Mehak isolates herself after an assault. In a new home, her fear grows as terrifying visions suggest a dark presence haunting her fragile mind. Release Year: 2016 Director: Pavan Kirpalani Awards: 2017 Winner Technical Award- Best Sound Design- Vivek Sachidanand

programme.title: Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya
programme.desc: Shiv and Pooja share a happy marriage until she discovers his infidelity. When film star Raj enters her life, love, choices, and self-worth are tested unexpectedly by fate. Release Year: 2002 Director: Dharmesh Darshan Awards: 2003 Winner, Reader's Choice - Best Supporting ActreSS - Simone Singh

programme.title: Angaaray
programme.desc: After Aarti is assaulted by her employer, her brother Sanjay tries to avenge her but is killed. Grief-stricken yet determined, Aarti decides to fight back and bring her attacker to justice. Release Year: 1986 Director: Rajesh Seth, Rajesh Sethi

programme.title: Daas Dev
programme.desc: Dev, heir to a political legacy, struggles with power, love, and addiction as his relationships with Paro and Chandni spiral, leading him into a complex web of ambition and self-destruction Release Year: 2018 Director: Sudhir Mishra

programme.title: Enemmy
programme.desc: After five undercover police officers take up the task of protecting Mumbai from gang wars, they arrest their prime suspect, Mukhtar. Later, a CBI officer, Yugantar, investigates the case. Release Year: 2013 Director: Ashu Trikha

programme.title: Tejas
programme.desc: Indian Air Force officer Tejas embarks on a risky mission to rescue an Indian spy from Pakistan. Along the way, she battles both formidable adversaries and haunting personal demons from her past. Release Year: 2023 Director: Sarvesh Mewara

programme.title: Laila Majnu
programme.desc: Two lovers from Kashmir are separated by family opposition and circumstances, leading Qais into obsession as their intense love story unfolds through pain, longing, and tragic destiny. Release Year: 1976 Director: Harnam Singh Rawail

programme.title: Kahaani 2: Durga Rani Singh
programme.desc: In a small town, Vidya cares for Minnie, a girl with paralysis. When Minnie is kidnapped, Vidya attempts a rescue but suffers an accident, landing in hospital while Minnie's fate hangs in danger. Release Year: 2016 Director: Sujoy Ghosh

programme.title: Wi-Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: #BrainCrush
programme.desc: Sam and Cat notice everyone, including their friends, are becoming obsessed with a new phone game, 'Brain Crush.' The game distracts the audience at Cat's one woman show.

programme.title: Raph Thinks It Through
programme.desc: Raph's strength won't save him when he's caught between the Mechazoids and the notorious street gang known as Purple Dragons! Raph's going to have to use his head to get out of this one!

programme.title: Donnie Hangs Tough
programme.desc: It's a battle of the wits between Donnie and Bishop as he races through NYC's subway system to stop her evil Mechazoids. But how do you beat an AI that counters your every move?

programme.title: The Salty Sponge / Karen for Spot
programme.desc: SpongeBob works the grill at the toughest joint in town. // Karen looks after Spot while Plankton goes out of town.

programme.title: Arbor Day Disarray / Ain't That the Tooth
programme.desc: Sandy gives her friends special saltwater trees, but they need more attention than she expected. // SpongeBob and Patrick mistake a burglar for the tooth fairy.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: Bad Eggs / Out of Bounds
programme.desc: Best ruins Bester's painting by accident so in order to avoid hurting her feelings he blames an innocent chicken. // Having lost their soccer ball over the garden fence, the twins have no option but to find a way to get it back.

programme.title: Robo Stomp / Wood You?
programme.desc: Bester's record attempt is at risk when Best steals her thunder by being the robot instead of learning the robot. // On a search for the first woodpecker in spring, Best finds that he's in very much in tune with nature after all.

programme.title: Pat-per Route / Day of the Dartfish
programme.desc: Patrick helps Squidward with his newspaper delivery job to compensate for injuring him. // In the midst of a typical day of scavenging, the Dartfish family discovers a thief in the Star home.

programme.title: Patty-Poo / Swaptoberfest
programme.desc: Patrick spawns an adorable mini-Patrick who quickly becomes the star of the show (until he outgrows the role). // The Star family celebrates the Klopnodian holiday Swaptoberfest by swapping identities with each other.

programme.title: Lighthouse Louie / Hiccup Plague
programme.desc: SpongeBob cleans out the boating school lighthouse, where he finds a cute but inconvenient companion. // No one in Bikini Bottom is safe from a case of contagious hiccups.

programme.title: SpongeBob's Place
programme.desc: When SpongeBob cooks at home, Mr. Krabs' customers leave his restaurant and head for SpongeBob's Place.

programme.title: The Parent Zap
programme.desc: After Phoebe and Max let Chloe's friends watch a horror movie and eat candy, Jinx and Booch's parents want to meet Chloe's. With Hank and Barb away, Max and Phoebe transform into them to help Chloe. It goes well until the real Hank and Barb show up.

programme.title: Alien Zoo
programme.desc: When Danger Force becomes the newest exhibit at an Alien Zoo, Miles must find a way to break them out before they become alien dinner.

programme.title: Birthday Girl Down
programme.desc: Henry is not invited to a birthday party because he is accused of throwing the birthday girl off the roof the previous year. Captain Man agrees to help Henry clear his name.

programme.title: Dine and Bash / Sofa, So Good
programme.desc: After failing to make Chef Guy Grazer a meal on his show, the kids try to erase the footage before it airs. // The kids search all over Royal Woods to find the missing furniture they left outside while cleaning.

programme.title: The Last Laugh / Driver's Dread
programme.desc: Luan thinks Mr. Coconuts is out for revenge when she replaces him with Lola in her act. // Hoping to drive out to the outlets to meet Lori, Leni ooks for alternative ways to get her driver's license.

programme.title: How the Best Was Won
programme.desc: Ever wonder what it's like to grow up in a big family? Eleven-year-old Lincoln Loud gives viewers an inside look at how to survive the chaos of a huge household, especially as the only boy with ten sisters!

programme.title: UpWard / Unidentified Flailing Octopus
programme.desc: Lady Upturn introduces Squidward, and his musical "talents", to her high society friends after she becomes his patron. // Squidward sets out to prove that aliens aren't real...until he has a close encounter of his own.

programme.title: Bad Luck Bob / The Sandman Cometh
programme.desc: SpongeBob experiences a bad luck streak when his lucky tie clip suddenly goes missing. // When Patrick can't fall asleep, he seeks assistance from the Sandman.

programme.title: Dome Alone
programme.desc: While stuck in her dome, Sandy suspects Plankton's up to no good and recruits Patrick to investigate.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Thanks But No Thanksgiving
programme.desc: The Stars celebrate Thanksgiving with Bunny's side of the family in Klopnod.

programme.title: The Star Games
programme.desc: Patrick forces his entire family to participate in a series of different game show challenges.

programme.title: Candy Crushed / Master of Delusion
programme.desc: Lola struggles to dampen her sweet tooth when mom challenges her to go an entire week without sugar. // Lincoln strives to impress the Amazing Brailster when he's chosen to be his assistant at the Illusion Chateau.

programme.title: Present Tense / Any Given Sundae
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift. // Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids are good, so she uses baby smarts to avert sibling disasters

programme.title: Can't Hardly Wait / A Mutt Above
programme.desc: Lori takes a waitressing job at Dad's restaurant, but it turns out that serving is harder than she anticipated. // Spurred on by a classmate's mocking about Charles, Lana decides to train him to compete in a local dog show.

programme.title: Bye, Bye, Birthday / Tough Guise
programme.desc: Tired of the yearly cheer surrounding her birthday, Lucy casts a spell so her family will forget what day it is. // When Zach is given detention, Rusty and the rest of their friends try to toughen up him up so he'll fit in.

programme.title: Just a Little Pipe Problem / Camp Chuck
programme.desc: The Groom & Board gets a surprise inspection, but the broken pipe Jack and Lil neglected to fix might ruin them all. // Chuck's got a new hustle: theatre camp! Jack & Lil are sure it's a scam. But there's more to the chaotic show than they realized.

programme.title: Warriors Against the Realm
programme.desc: Lily introduces Jack to her favorite video game, but when he keeps losing, Jack binges the game and turns into a toxic troll.

programme.title: Plankton Retires / Trident Trouble
programme.desc: Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he's still up to no good. // When SpongeBob accidentally picks up Neptune's magic trident, there's no telling what trouble he may cause!

programme.title: Biddy Sitting
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: Cupid's Harrow
programme.desc: Leni accidentally causes trouble for Lori and Bobby while taking calls on her and Miguel's dating podcast.

programme.title: Stage Combat
programme.desc: Luna and Luan get competitive when they find out they're competing for the same performance grant.

programme.title: Present Tense / Any Given Sundae
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift. // Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids are good, so she uses baby smarts to avert sibling disasters

programme.title: Flip This Flip
programme.desc: The Loud kids help Flip clean up his image to impress his middle school crush.

programme.title: Best Summer Ever?
programme.desc: Jack & Lily are half-siblings living on opposite ends of the world both hoping to have the "best summer ever." When dangerous events forces Jack's mom to send him to live with his dad, the kids fear their summer dreams have become a nightmare.

programme.title: The Mastermind Unmasked: Part 1
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe discover that Lazlo Chance may be the evil Mastermind and enlist Chloe to help. But when Chloe is torn between her head and her heart, it threatens the entire mission.

programme.title: Toddler Invasion
programme.desc: When The Toddler takes control of the Man Cave, Charlotte and Jasper have to find a way to sneak into the Man Cave and free Kid Danger and Captain Man.

programme.title: iHurt Lewbert
programme.desc: A 'Messing With Lewbert' sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly's obnoxious doorman. The gang nurses him back to health until Freddie's mother steps in and takes over. When a romance starts to blossom they have to stop it.

programme.title: Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: Bring It On
programme.desc: Trying out for the cheerleading squad, Lay Lay and Sadie add their own twists to the routine, but learn that standing out doesn't always work when trying to fit into a team.

programme.title: The Boss Maybe / Family Bonding
programme.desc: Now the oldest in the house, Leni struggles to follow in Lori's footsteps as the family's babysitter. // Secret agents Lincoln and Clyde investigate the Loud's suspicious new neighbors.

programme.title: Suite and Sour / Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids - but only because they promised to behave. // When Lucy gets a crush on a 'regular and normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: Date Night / Behind the Jingle
programme.desc: Will and Min's date ends up in a rideshare turf war. At home, Halmoni throws a party as the kids try to prove they can watch themselves. // The family gets famous after their Groom & Board Jingle hits #1. But fame is fickle and tears them apart.

programme.title: Bizarro Bottom / Squidward's Tough Break
programme.desc: SpongeBob falls asleep on the bus and ends up in a strange town full of Bikini Bottom doppelgangers. // After Squidward loses his memory, he adopts a new tough guy persona.

programme.title: Get Ouch / Day of the Living Dad Jokes
programme.desc: After getting rid of Ouchie, Pinkeye takes over the Star house. // Patrick and Squidina must find safety amidst the dad joke apocalypse.

programme.title: Super Sitters
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob go back in time to watch Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy when they were new.

programme.title: Heavy Meddle / Making the Case
programme.desc: Lincoln is tired of his sisters meddling in his business until he's being picked on at school. // Lincoln secretly videos his sister's most embarrassing moments in order to win a video contest at school.

programme.title: Candy Crushed / Master of Delusion
programme.desc: Lola struggles to dampen her sweet tooth when mom challenges her to go an entire week without sugar. // Lincoln strives to impress the Amazing Brailster when he's chosen to be his assistant at the Illusion Chateau.

programme.title: Prison Break / Canyon Valley Film Festival
programme.desc: When Jack and Lil are grounded by Will and Min, who are then grounded by Halmoni, the family team up to escape their punishment. // Canyon Valley hosts a festival and Jack's excited to enter, until the pressure to deliver a masterpiece gets to him.

programme.title: Dubu / Jack's Day Off
programme.desc: Halmoni falls in love with a customer's dog. Rather than return him, she dog-naps him and goes on the lam! // Jack volunteers to run the Groom & Board solo, but when a pet snake causes chaos he must protect the other pets from the jaws of death!

programme.title: Say 'Awww!'/ Patrick the Mailman
programme.desc: Frustrated that he's seen as cute instead of evil, Plankton builds a robot to punish anyone who says "aww!" // Patrick crushes the mailman, so he and SpongeBob deliver the mail around Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: Chore and Peace
programme.desc: Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

programme.title: She's All Splat
programme.desc: With Cherry working at Splat by Sea, Max ropes her into a fake dating scheme to score partner discounts at the restaurant. Chloe faces a tough choice between winning a trivia competition or supporting her brother Billy when he wants to join her team.

programme.title: Caved In
programme.desc: Henry, Charlotte, and Ray's plans for a day of fun are derailed when Jasper accidentally triggers the emergency lockdown mode for Junk-N-Stuff and the Man Cave, trapping everyone inside.

programme.title: Man of the House
programme.desc: When Henry's mom has her purse stolen, Captain Man decides he should move in with Henry's family in order to protect them. Soon, Captain Man takes on a fatherly role which becomes more than Henry likes.

programme.title: iPie
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: #FresnoGirl
programme.desc: Sam and Cat promise to buy a girl they babysit a Fresno Girl doll if she raises her grades. When she does, Sam and Cat are financially strained by the markups and add-ons that come with it. Goomer loses his lucky t-shirt.

programme.title: Night Of The Mechazoids
programme.desc: The Turtles take the fight to Bishop but she's ready for them... get ready for MECHA-BIHSOP! But when the Mechazoids go out of control, can the Turtles save humanity?

programme.title: The Flower Plot / SpongeBob on Parade
programme.desc: The Chum Bucket is replaced by a flower shop with a charming new owner. // The Krusty Krab enters a float in the annual Bikini Bottom Parade.

programme.title: Chess-a-pult / Smart & Smarter
programme.desc: Best and Bester turn themselves into chess pieces but have to abandon their game to save the sub from flooding. // Bester and Best are tasked with neutralising the enemy agent's ransomware for the Bettervale Investigation Bureau.

programme.title: A Cabin in the Kelp / The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals take Pearl to a cabin in the woods for a weekend of silly pranks. // Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something surprising.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: Get Ouch / Day of the Living Dad Jokes
programme.desc: After getting rid of Ouchie, Pinkeye takes over the Star house. // Patrick and Squidina must find safety amidst the dad joke apocalypse.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: The lives of two hitmen, a mob boss' wife, an aging boxer and two small-time thieves are woven together in an adventure of thrills and amuses.

programme.title: Man With No Past
programme.desc: A man with no memory searches for the truth of his past, only to be led straight into a lethal showdown with a powerful enemy.

programme.title: In Pursuit Of Honor
programme.desc: Don Johnson leads a group of men in the fight to save the cavalry's last horses from slaughter.

programme.title: Reminiscence
programme.desc: A private investigator of the mind navigates the past by accessing lost memories. His life is changed by a new client as he fights to find the truth about her disappearance.

programme.title: Shazam!
programme.desc: A kid has the ability to turn into Shazam, an adult superhero. But he needs to master his powers quickly to fight the deadly forces of evil.

programme.title: Downsizing
programme.desc: When scientists find a way to shrink humans to five inches tall, a couple decides to ditch their stressed out lives and downsize to live large in a luxurious community.

programme.title: El Diablo
programme.desc: A mild-mannered schoolteacher vows to rescue a kidnapped girl from the deadly outlaw El Diablo.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: The Truman Show
programme.desc: Truman Burbank is the star of his own TV show and the town he has lived in all his life is really a soundstage! Stars Jim Carrey.

programme.title: Juror #2
programme.desc: A juror in a high-profile murder trial faces a serious moral dilemma... one that could sway the jury to convict or free the accused killer.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: After witnessing the death of his parents as a child, Bruce Wayne pledges his life and resources to combating crime as the Caped Crusader, Batman.

programme.title: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: An interconnected group of young adults navigates their relationships, from the shallow end of the dating pool through the deep, murky waters of married life.

programme.title: Something's Gotta Give
programme.desc: An unlikely love triangle teaches three individuals the value of love and life.

programme.title: Mountainhead
programme.desc: A group of billionaire friends get together against the backdrop of a rolling international crisis.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: A doubting boy finds out first-hand that Santa exists when he goes aboard a magical train headed for the North Pole.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po’s new life as The Dragon Warrior is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain determined to conquer China and destroy Kung Fu.

programme.title: Save The Last Dance
programme.desc: A small-town girl with big dreams must face the biggest challenge of her life - to stay true to her dream and her new romance.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: The origin story of the man who became Dracula. Vlad III, Prince of Wallachia, enters into a Faustian pact to save his people and becomes inflicted with an insatiable thirst for human blood.

programme.title: Down To You
programme.desc: Al and Imogen begin a romantic journey where true love often competes with the temptation to stray from commitment.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Three divorced women seek revenge on the husbands who left them for younger women.

programme.title: Star Trek: Section 31
programme.desc: Emperor Philippa Georgiou joins a secret division of Starfleet, tasked with protecting the United Federation of Planets.

programme.title: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: An interconnected group of young adults navigates their relationships, from the shallow end of the dating pool through the deep, murky waters of married life.

programme.title: Death Of A Unicorn
programme.desc: Father-Daughter duo Elliott and Ridley hit a unicorn with their car and bring it to the wilderness retreat of a mega-wealthy pharmaceutical CEO.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Keliatan Banget Nyenggol Hati King Dosen
programme.desc: As Galang passed by, a man wearing the same jacket ran past him. Moments later, the man came chasing after Erin's purse snatcher. Galang was nearly beaten by the mob. Galang was accused of stealing Erin's wallet. Ultimately, Galang was saved and acquitted. Erin searched for the house address and managed to find Lalu, who introduced himself as Johan's son. It turned out that Erin had been searching for her family.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: Dikira Anak APT APT Enggak Baik?
programme.desc: Zahwa (Jennifer Eve) is stressed and annoyed with her boss, Adit (Ridho Illahi), who asks her to sell multiple apartment units in a single day as a salesperson. However, that annoyance slowly turns into the seeds of love.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: THE SULTAN ENTERTAINMENT
programme.desc: The Sultan is a talk show featuring two sultan-like hosts: Sultan Andara and Raffi Ahmad and Sultan Bintaro and Andre Taulany, accompanied by a cast of beautiful and handsome employees. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed. Find out more at The Sultan Entertainment.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: Sudah Jatuh Ketiban Duren Iya Lagi Iya Lagi
programme.desc: Juna, a durian tycoon who owns a durian orchard, meets Ambar, unaware that Juna is the boss of the durian orchard that Ambar is looking after. Juna, who is sick because it's his first time working in the field, doesn't get any attention from Maya. But suddenly Maya cheats on him with Aldo. Juna, who finds out, is disappointed with Maya.

programme.title: Cinta Abang Tamvan Pantang Disayurin
programme.desc: Nando (Morgan Oey) helps Sesil (Rayna Snova), who is about to be sold abroad. Nando asks his mother for permission to let Sesil stay at her house.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: Garam dan Madu Aku Biro Kamu Mau?
programme.desc: A beautiful girl named Fuji (Larasati Nugroho), the owner of a matchmaking agency. One day, Fuji gets a client, a barbershop owner's son named Ivan (Arya Vasco). From there, Ivan is asked by his mother to find a partner. Until finally, Ivan, the barbershop owner, says, "Why don't you be my partner, and I introduce you to my mother?"

programme.title: Mahkotamu Ketinggalan di DC Cakung Queen
programme.desc: Keyla was shocked to meet Roy at the market. Roy accidentally saw Keyla, Keyla immediately ran into the market and accidentally hit Yudi in the market. programme.title: Seasoning the Seasons
programme.desc: This programme visits places across Japan to introduce the charms of their local daily life and festivals fostered by the nation's long history.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: Hisayama Town in southern Japan has held health check-ups since the 1960s - using this data, Kyushu University identified two markers linked to early dementia. We present the latest findings.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: The historic city of Kyoto faces threats of landslides and post-earthquake fires - what modern systems defend this ancient city from natural disasters?

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Global warming leads to widespread famine - by 2100, it is predicted that yields of maize, soybeans and wheat may fall by 30 to 40 per cent. We examine the scientific data on this global issue.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Culture Crossroads
programme.desc: A popular cafe in Osaka offers international dishes on a day-by-day rotating basis - this helps the foreign residents who prepare them, called 'one-day chefs', to get involved in Japanese society.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: Every winter, a group of performers in Kikonai, Hokkaido drench themselves in freezing water in hopes of inviting a bountiful harvest and catch. We follow efforts to preserve this timeless ritual.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Journeys in Japan
programme.desc: Colleen experiences the cosmopolitan port city of Nagasaki during Obon - when people welcome home deceased family members with fireworks - and sees ways in which China has influenced it.

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Dining with the Chef
programme.desc: Learn how to cook tempura at home as Chef Saito demonstrates the techniques needed to make crispy tempura using mountain vegetables of spring.

programme.title: Science View
programme.desc: Squid and cuttlefish use camouflage not just to hide but to communicate. Vanguard Researchers explores the mechanism behind plant immunity.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Journeys in Japan
programme.desc: Colleen experiences the cosmopolitan port city of Nagasaki during Obon - when people welcome home deceased family members with fireworks - and sees ways in which China has influenced it.

programme.title: 大醉侠
programme.desc: 女侠「金燕子」的兄长被山贼掳走，幸得武功高强的「醉侠」范大悲相助，从作恶多端的寺庙主持手上救出兄长。本片曾代表香港出战第39届奥斯卡金像奖最佳外语片的首轮评选。

programme.title: 花团锦簇
programme.desc: 时装设计师史马哥向叶德梅征求她对自己作品的意见，梅却随意提出批评，这让马哥感到非常不满。一天，梅准备出席一场盛大的宴会，于是找马哥为她设计礼服，不料他为报复故意设计了一件小丑装，让梅颜面尽失。最终，史马哥却很内疚并向梅道歉，两人冰释前嫌，并坠入爱河。

programme.title: 龙虎少爷
programme.desc: 执到宝为武功了得的寻宝专家，因闻招九积自称有张保仔宝藏之线索，乃往赌场将其救出；招云古董商人鲁古董藏有张生前一批信札，执、招夜窃不遂，以敲碎古玩要胁，取得信札；惟信札字迹陈旧，仅认清法华寺字样；彼时适逢高僧无相下山，执遂假扮疯僧约无相谈禅，招则暗闯其房搜寻秘密...

programme.title: 乌龙济公
programme.desc: 济公与修道成仙的吕洞宾斗智斗法，二人使出浑身解数，不论是笑声、法力、风流韵事，甚至乎兵器，双方都不惜一切对决到底！

programme.title: 金燕子
programme.desc: 白衣大侠和黑色醉侠同时爱上女侠金燕子。三人却联手对付江湖中的恶势力。在一场生死对决展开前，金燕子还是迟迟未能作出自己感情的抉择。

programme.title: 女巡按
programme.desc: 影后李菁的代表作，萧湘反串文必正，倾慕官府小姐霍定金，卖身混入霍家，二人私定终身，必正被陷害入狱，定金设法营救...

programme.title: 五虎将
programme.desc: 一帮土匪带着劫来的保险箱到某小镇，迫铁匠韦开箱，韦却逃走报官。匪帮滥杀村民，多名义士闻讯，联手对抗众匪。

programme.title: 万花迎春
programme.desc: 歌舞团台柱陈君迈赋闲多时后，应征当富家女梅倩如的司机，竟被误传恋情。倩如为查明流言的来源，假扮记者采访歌舞团，期间君迈与倩如暗生好感，经过一番试探后，二人终一舞定情。

programme.title: 暗渠
programme.desc: 故事讲述侦缉警长赵敬才因一次行动，连累下属被劫匪击毙，而被上司指责处事鲁莽，改派督察邱正明接办案件。敬才与正明办案作风迥异，冲突日多。职业杀手利子健受雇来港狙杀殷商徐文，岂料行动时却误中副车，仅杀死徐文之助手；当徐文查得杀手为子健后，急欲除之。警方接获线报，即派正明与敬才率队出发，阻止黑帮火拼......

programme.title: 包剪石沓
programme.desc: 幽默风趣的爱情喜剧，三个年青医生常开道、史瑞科、萧而可，被安排追求院长的三个女儿灵珍、灵珊、灵玲。三人以「包、剪、搥」来决定追求对象，他们的追女桥段层出不穷，用尽英雄救美、苦肉计、死缠烂打等爱情药方，却全部失灵，乌龙百出...

programme.title: 五虎屠龙
programme.desc: 高氏五兄弟，少时家遭巨变，流离失散。长大后，各有际遇，不知杀父仇人就是无恶不作的腾龙庄主。但五兄弟各自均不满腾龙庄欺凌弱小之所作所为，并誓要除魔。当五兄弟重逢后，他们一起努力练功，准备与腾龙庄庄主及其帮会一战。

programme.title: 邪斗邪
programme.desc: 余腩沉溺赌海，由于欠债累累无力偿还，遂答应债主以其妻肉偿债项。事件被其妻识破，并决意离余而去。余动轻生念头，可最终自杀未遂。余遇上一名富家老伯，老伯答应给余巨额现金，只要余答应帮他娶得美人归...

programme.title: Great Hammerhead Sharks
programme.desc: The team of young shark saviours are coming to the end of their time in the shark sanctuary around the island of Bimini in the Bahamas. Now, they are on their last dive - to see great hammerheads.

programme.title: Budapest
programme.desc: In Budapest Joanna explores the river by boat and rides a unique children's railway, as well as discovering the city's Jewish heritage.

programme.title: Aztecs
programme.desc: The world of the Aztecs is invaded by the Spanish - but is the real threat from within?
