programme.title: Mondays At Racine
programme.desc: Inspired by their mother, a cancer victim, two sisters own a beauty salon in New York, which they open free of charge to cancer patients once a month on Mondays.

programme.title: Land Of Gold
programme.desc: A truck driver finds a young Mexican American girl inside his shipping container and his life takes a turn as he tries to reunite her with her family.

programme.title: Sugar
programme.desc: An HBO Original film of a baseball pitcher who struggles to pull his family out of poverty.

programme.title: A Most Powerful Adversary
programme.desc: Nora gives Kevin and Jill news they weren't expecting; Laurie makes a decision that impacts the Garveys.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: Cady is a hit with the A-list clique at her new school, until she makes the mistake of falling for one of their ex-boyfriends.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love
programme.desc: A straight-laced man tries to play the field, but discovers that his heart will always be with his wife.

programme.title: Deadwood: The Movie
programme.desc: Set in 1876, when the richest gold strike in U.S. history drew a throng of restless misfits to an outlaw settlement in the Black Hills of South Dakota.

programme.title: Nixon By Nixon: In His Own Words
programme.desc: This HBO Documentary shows the many sides of former president Richard Nixon, through his self-recorded private conversations in the White House from 1971 to 1973.

programme.title: Land Of Gold
programme.desc: A truck driver finds a young Mexican American girl inside his shipping container and his life takes a turn as he tries to reunite her with her family.

programme.title: The Leisure Class
programme.desc: The winning entry from HBO's Project Greenlight about a man trying to marry into a wealthy family and his wild, unpredictable brother who could ruin everything.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: The untold story of the Witches of Oz, spotlighting the untold stories of Oz's most infamous characters.

programme.title: Episode 9
programme.desc: A comedy set on a college campus centering on an author's (Steve Carell) complicated relationship with his daughter (Charly Clive).

programme.title: Episode 7
programme.desc: Explores the madness of the television world and the bravery of a tragic actress as she struggles to keep her career afloat while balancing her personal life

programme.title: Episode 4
programme.desc: Euphoria follows a group of high school students as they navigate love and friendships in a world of drugs, sex, trauma, and social media.

programme.title: Dhool Ka Phool
programme.desc: Mahesh and Meena fall in love but he marries another girl at his father's behest. When Meena takes their baby to Mahesh, he rejects her saying their relationship was a mistake.

programme.title: Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega
programme.desc: Raj, Pooja and Jhanvi are in a complicated love triangle. Pooja and Jhanvi love Raj. Raj loves Jhanvi but is misunderstood as Pooja's husband by their family. How will the confusion clear off?

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez: Kantara
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Bhool Bhulaiya 3
programme.desc: Rooh Baba steps into a spooky estate and faces two mysterious spirit, both claiming to be Manjulika.

programme.title: Bairaag
programme.desc: Manservant Bhola is secretly in love with his master's granddaughter but she is set to wed another. But the dowry-demanding groom absconds with the money and Bhola is sent to bring him back.

programme.title: Style
programme.desc: Best friends Bantu and Chantu try make two wealthy girls fall in love with them. However, they find out that the girls have been murdered and become prime suspects.

programme.title: Arjun Patiala
programme.desc: Arjun Patiala is a quirky small-town cop, who is fond of women and even more fond of his drinks. His original and unusual ideas help reduce crime rate in the town.

programme.title: Saala Khadoos
programme.desc: The story of a former boxer who quits boxing following a fallout with the authorities but goes on to coach a fisherwoman to fulfill his dream through her. Starring Madhavan.

programme.title: Hit- The First Case
programme.desc: A brilliant but troubled police inspector sets out to solve a confounding case, all while fighting to gain clarity into his troubled past.

programme.title: Aetbar
programme.desc: Dr. Ranveer tries to stop Ria, his daughter, from pursuing a romantic relationship with Aryan, an unpredictable and possessive man. She does not heed her father's words and continues dating him.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱新来的医生张志明精明能干，深得一妍赏识，一妍更委任他为肺肝同步移植手术的换肝主刀医生。以珈向董事会成员杏芳与袁添维争取主席之位的选票，却不果。一妍的腕管综合症越来越严重，但她为了手术可如期进行而隐瞒病情。原来当年一妍曾收到匿名告密信，指多年前立万有份执刀的肺肝同步移植手术，是因负责肝移植部份的杨旭川医生失误导致病人死亡

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明闯入叶凌霜的闭关处，发现她在尝试解开封印并陷入了幻境。叶凌霜被唤醒后对彧修明大发雷霆，责怪他利用夜北百姓作为牺牲品。随后，叶凌霜被彧修明打入天牢，但很快又被放出并恢复职位。在朝堂上，彧修明借叶凌霜之口警示朝臣，并定下规矩。后来彧修明邀请叶凌霜陪同巡狩，最初被拒绝，但叶凌霜在得知七海伶未死的消息后改变主意，并成功说服彧修明让她随行。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱新来的医生张志明精明能干，深得一妍赏识，一妍更委任他为肺肝同步移植手术的换肝主刀医生。以珈向董事会成员杏芳与袁添维争取主席之位的选票，却不果。一妍的腕管综合症越来越严重，但她为了手术可如期进行而隐瞒病情。原来当年一妍曾收到匿名告密信，指多年前立万有份执刀的肺肝同步移植手术，是因负责肝移植部份的杨旭川医生失误导致病人死亡

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明闯入叶凌霜的闭关处，发现她在尝试解开封印并陷入了幻境。叶凌霜被唤醒后对彧修明大发雷霆，责怪他利用夜北百姓作为牺牲品。随后，叶凌霜被彧修明打入天牢，但很快又被放出并恢复职位。在朝堂上，彧修明借叶凌霜之口警示朝臣，并定下规矩。后来彧修明邀请叶凌霜陪同巡狩，最初被拒绝，但叶凌霜在得知七海伶未死的消息后改变主意，并成功说服彧修明让她随行。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 满月借助社团追杀永源，惟家朗及时赶到，令身受重伤的永源逃之夭夭……家朗想起满月曾在现场附近出现，对她起疑。曦晨在医院醒来后，得知满月独自背负一切，决要全力支持她。基俊的桃色绯闻险曝光，幸芳要慧云做好门面功夫。满月献计，为慧云筹办惊喜派对，基俊不爽与慧云对质……满月被基俊为难，幸得成风出手解围。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】永成的儿子柯睿晖替明塱慈善基金表演筹款，永成发现后到场要拉走睿晖，导致睿晖惊恐症发作，幸得启心助他平伏。永成要启澄、建邦加入明塱医疗城专案小组，为他争取好处。启澄、建邦找秀琳出面，以主席选票作交换，让一妍答应两人加入专案小组。杏芳提到明塱将实行加工时减福利的优化计划，英杰不满并提出质疑。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明拒绝了大臣将叶凌霜纳入后宫的建议，并与她一同出发巡狩。期间，叶凌霜将云纹托付给顾惘然照看。在巡狩过程中，彧修明揭露了中州大都护蔡骖的违法行为。蔡骖因此计划反叛，试图在枕霞山切断彧修明的救兵后杀了他。然而，彧修明早有准备，他和叶凌霜一起面对险境。在蔡军围攻枕霞山时，叶凌霜决定留下坚守，而彧修明则下山求援。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明拒绝了大臣将叶凌霜纳入后宫的建议，并与她一同出发巡狩。期间，叶凌霜将云纹托付给顾惘然照看。在巡狩过程中，彧修明揭露了中州大都护蔡骖的违法行为。蔡骖因此计划反叛，试图在枕霞山切断彧修明的救兵后杀了他。然而，彧修明早有准备，他和叶凌霜一起面对险境。在蔡军围攻枕霞山时，叶凌霜决定留下坚守，而彧修明则下山求援。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 基俊利用会计部员工唐子超，替他洗黑钱。慧云透过人工授孕成功怀上基俊血脉，哲贤大喜，欲将部份公司的拥有权转到慧云名下，惹来基俊不悦。幸芳安抚基俊，揭露惊人秘密。记者区乐瑶加入满月复仇计划，原来是满月利用董博引诱基俊中饱私囊。宝鐷工地被揭欠薪停工，哲贤重回公司，向昊天求助。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】宇泽被一妍勒令停职，丽雪以董事会主席的投票作交换，希望一妍帮助宇泽。明塱医院实行优化计划，结果引发职员罢工抗议！工潮期间，董事袁添维的大哥心脏病入院、丽雪招待基金会重要捐款人到访、启心的男友亦谦苏醒等重要大事接连出现。一妍怀疑有黑手于背后推动工潮，而黑手竟是以珈与德桥，以珈还凭此事令杏芳答应在选董事会主席时投其一票。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜在彧修明下山求援期间，坚守枕霞山并成功抵御蔡骖的围攻。在危机时刻，彧修明及时归来，救下了准备自尽的叶凌霜。之后，叶凌霜利用自己的影响力，为叛军家属求情，使彧修明赦免了他们。在前往闵中山的途中，叶凌霜被人推下藤桥，但幸得彧修明相救。在一次意外中，叶凌霜进入了一个法阵，得知了彧修明身世的秘密和他的使命。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Washed-up revolutionary Bob exists in a state of stoned paranoia. When his nemesis resurfaces and his daughter goes missing, Bob must find her.

programme.title: High Rollers
programme.desc: Mason's crew is forced to pull off a dangerous heist for a powerful criminal, with the FBI chasing them and a family feud threatening their lives.

programme.desc: When a high school senior discovers a gas-guzzling creature, he embarks on a journey to reunite his new-found friend with his family.

programme.desc: Catherine Zeta Jones stars as a chef with a fiery temper struggling to care for her orphan niece and manage the handsome new sous chef.

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: The disappearance of an eight-year-old girl sets off a chain of events.

programme.title: Doodlebook
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Changing Of The Guard
programme.desc: After fruitless searching the universe for Shiro, the Paladins struggle to accept that they must find a new pilot to join the team

programme.title: Welcome to Harmony Harbor
programme.desc: Ari moves in to Harmony Harbor, but notices something strange involving a group of kids, a Noodle Truck chef and her pet squirrel. / After Ari discovers the secret of Team Zenko Go, he asks to join the crew. But first he must learn the importance of teamwork.

programme.title: Scaredy Cat Boot Camp / Ichabeezer Moves Out
programme.desc: Mr. Pea helps the Veggies face their fears in an overnight boot camp/Bob and Petunia try to encourage Ichabeezer to stay when he wants to move out

programme.title: The Missing Jetpack / Bacon Vs. Tomato
programme.desc: LarryBoy and Junior No-pack must investigate when Junior's jetpack is missing/Bob gets jealous when Larry calls Bacon Bill his BFF

programme.title: Little Sisters / Tricky Treasure
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. They play and become friends. / The unicorns are eager to play with a new mystery item that washes up on the beach, but what is it? While the other unicorns come up with imaginative ideas of what it could be, Pixie is determined to find out exactly what it is.

programme.title: Crabby / Spe-shell
programme.desc: When Pixie’s pet crab goes into a cave, Kelp uses his knowledge of crabs under the sea to coax him out using dance and rhythm. / Scallop’s special shell is broken, but Kelp transforms the broken bits into something even more special.

programme.title: Gabby, I Shrunk the Kitties!
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: It's Purrsday!
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Boo to You
programme.desc: Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.title: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: After Magnus accuses Cutter of setting fires near the village that could hurt the sheep, the Riders have to put them out and find the real culprit.

programme.title: Delivery Disaster / Slippery Business
programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.title: The Sleepover Save / The Very Hungry Vacuum
programme.desc: Marcus is having his first sleepover and Phoebe is concerned that Marcus may be nervous so Phoebe sets out to make sure he has the best first sleepover ever. / When Athena’s magical jump rope gets sucked up by the family’s new robot vacuum, she loses confidence in her abilities, only to learn that her real abilities are already inside her.

programme.title: Old Dog, New Tricks \ Snoozie-Hullabaloozie
programme.desc: Tag chooses to pair up with her Grandpaw for the Barker Family Talent Show, and together, they search for their winning talent. \ Tag is surprised to learn that today is the Pawston Snoozie-a-Hullabaloozie. With everything shut down for the day, Tag and Scooch take the opportunity to play all over town, while trying not to wake up other dogs.

programme.title: Show Dog, Show \ Keys to Victory
programme.desc: Tag can't wait to show off her car at the car show. But when Cheddar Biscuit wants to come along and pick up her clown friends along the way, Tag is wary that Cheddar Biscuit will steal her thunder. \ The Not Yet Cadets can't wait to watch Sam’s big race. But when Sam loses his car key, he challenges the Not Yet Cadets to race around town to find it.

programme.title: Gabby, I Shrunk the Kitties!
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: It's Purrsday!
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Berry Race / The Artist
programme.desc: The kids have a race to decide who gets to try some extremely rare berries. / When Scallop finds a beautiful and mysterious sea sculpture, she enlists the help of her friends to search the sea for the artist behind the masterpiece.

programme.title: Winkly Fest / Snow
programme.desc: When Pixie struggles to recreate an old tradition perfectly, the kids realize they can make their own traditions./ A story told by Chef J inspires Juniper to go in search of snow.

programme.title: Boo to You
programme.desc: Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.title: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: After Magnus accuses Cutter of setting fires near the village that could hurt the sheep, the Riders have to put them out and find the real culprit.

programme.title: Speed
programme.desc: Ty can't stop rolling after Skrap-It steals his master cylinder, so the Trux must quickly figure out a fix before he falls off the edge of a cliff

programme.title: Lucky and the Flight of the Fancy
programme.desc: Lucky, Julian and Aunt Cora get swept away in Julian’s new hot air balloon and must fend for themselves in the wilderness

programme.title: Clubbing
programme.desc: Homesick, Cleo tries joining some school clubs to feel better. Her homesickness has an unexpected and destructive effect.

programme.title: Humility
programme.desc: Cleo’s over confidence gets her friends captured, and to rescue them she must convince a tribe of laidback aliens she can master their high values of humility, serenity, and caution.

programme.title: Wet Hot Ahhh Valley Summer / Grug Vs The Moon
programme.desc: When Eep and Thunk challenge each other in the first-ever dare-off, Thunk faces the deep end - his greatest fear; Grug picks a fight with the moon.

programme.title: This Means Warts
programme.desc: When snobby neighbors move in next door and complain about a bone pile blocking their backyard view, The Croods launch into the first-ever prank war.

programme.title: Animal House
programme.desc: As an approaching storm threatens Berk, Hiccup must work fast to make peace between the food-providing farm animals and the dragons.

programme.title: The Terrible Twos
programme.desc: When Hiccup adopts a baby dragon that appears orphaned, Toothless becomes jealous and the baby dragon’s bereaved mother threatens the village.

programme.title: To Heather Or Not To Heather
programme.desc: When Heather and Windshear land on Dragon's Edge to join the Dragon Rider crew, they quickly discover that Windshear doesn't play well with others.

programme.title: Stryke Out
programme.desc: Hiccup and Toothless are captured and must find a way to escape the Dragon Fighting arena and survive an attack from the fearsome Triple Stryke dragon.

programme.title: Tone Death
programme.desc: After the Riders save a Deathsong egg from the Dragon Hunters, they must take it back to Melody Island when the hatched baby won't stop crying.

programme.title: Game Plan
programme.desc: Boss tries to rename the local soccer team to "The Babies", but after Danny gets involved in the popularity race with his name, "The Hot Dogs", the town becomes divided. Boss creates a crack team of Baby Corp employees to game plan solutions to the worst outcomes.

programme.title: Night Owls
programme.desc: Boss arranges a sleepover with Quiet Psycho Baby to get access to her father the Mayor's day planner, hoping to plant his own pro-baby agenda. However, staying up all night has the unexpected consequence of delusional over-tiredness! Tim sneaks into an art film and decides he has to be a grown-up now, so Mom and Dad try to "kid" him up again.

programme.title: OCB
programme.desc: Boss' reign as CEO is threatened by a charming, multiple-dimpled Outside Consultant Baby (OCB) hired by the Board of Directors. Boss, furious that OCB will ruin Baby Corp with his poorly thought out ideas, tries to distract him while Staci adds the finishing touches to a project that will make OCB unnecessary, The 24 Hour Diaper.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Disturbing Dilemma of the Dysfunctional Doppelgangers
programme.desc: The crew meets their blue-hued doppelgängers when they crash-land on an alien planet where kids call all the shots.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Confusing Crisis of the Conniving Captive
programme.desc: Melvin isn't exactly their friend ... but it's not like George and Harold can just let him be held captive by diabolical Biglyans, right? Right?!?

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Aggravated Assault of the Alien Armada
programme.desc: Oh, the indignity: George and Harold are forced to perform spa treatments on gigantic Biglyans. Also, Dr. Fitzgibbons reveals a shocking secret.

programme.title: Between A Rock And A Hard Place
programme.desc: When Hiccup and the Riders discover that Viggo is using two captured Catastrophic Quakens to build a dragon prison, they must help the dragons escape.

programme.title: Family On The Edge
programme.desc: When Dagur comes to Dragon's Edge looking for Heather, Hiccup tries to keep the two siblings apart by teaching Dagur the art of Dragon Riding.

programme.title: Last Auction Heroes
programme.desc: When the Riders uncover the location of Viggo's Dragon Auction, they must stop him from selling dragons and stealing all the gold in Berk.

programme.title: The Intruder Flies a Crooked Path
programme.desc: When Jindiao arrives to the Village, he invites the kids to participate in an exhibition match, but has alternative motives

programme.title: A Fistful of Herbs
programme.desc: When Po discovers he was poisoned, he sets off to a caravan oasis in the hopes of finding out who the perpetrator is, unknowingly followed by the kid

programme.title: Poison in the Pit of the Plum
programme.desc: When Po and the kids stop for the night at an Inn, they meet a gang who wants to fight Po and end up down a path to uncovering Jindiao's evil plan

programme.title: Gnome Your Enemy
programme.desc: Jim undertakes his first Trollhunting mission by starting small: he must shrink down to eight inches tall to apprehend a mischievous gnome.

programme.title: Waka Chaka
programme.desc: When Jim and Toby investigate a Goblin attack, they discover Changelings are secretly living amongst them and rebuilding the Killahead Bridge!

programme.title: Win, Lose Or Draal
programme.desc: Everything comes into perspective when Jim discovers his re-match with Draal is to the death.

programme.title: Sirocco Fire Explosion
programme.desc: Cleve has the team surrounded - is this the end? Suddenly, Cisco bursts in to save the day, along with all of the friends the team has made along the way in the Sahara. Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.title: Chasing Phantoms
programme.desc: After an epic chase around the globe, the team finally catches Rafaela, making it Ms. Nowhere's 100th arrest - and the agency is throwing her a party! Meanwhile, Cisco's uncle Tuco, a famous luchador in Mexico, is visiting town promoting his next show. But the celebration comes to a halt when there's an explosion at the party and an attack by a mysterious group of criminals!

programme.title: The Convoy
programme.desc: When the team is framed for the events of Ms. Nowhere's party, they're arrested and are on their way to separate government facilities. It's up to Frostee, with a help from Sissy, to track down the team and bust them out before they're locked up for good!

programme.title: Beetle Mania
programme.desc: When an alien beetle infestation threatens to expose their true identities, the Royals must depend on a new ally for help. Meanwhile, Zadra joins Morando’s army as a double agent who secretly spies on him for the growing Resistance.

programme.title: Collision Course
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: D'aja Vu
programme.desc: Stuck in a time-loop, Aja finds unlikely help from Jim Lake and Team Trollhunters. Meanwhile, a giant Troll rampages the Arcadia High Science Fair, threatening to expose both the Troll world and Aja and Krel’s alien secret.

programme.title: Born a Toretto
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Enter SH1FT3R
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Ghost Town Grand Prix
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: The Owl Job
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: The Celestial Vault
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Red Paladin
programme.desc: A new leader of Voltron must be found before Lotor's forces attack.

programme.title: Delivery Disaster / Slippery Business
programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.title: Motato Gets A Job / Pet Day
programme.desc: Motato temps Larry to goof off on their new job at Pa Grape's store/Captain Mike and Mr. Pea compete to get Junior and Tiny Pea the best pet ever

programme.title: Blueberry's Tickets / A Club Divided
programme.desc: Madame Blueberry wins tickets to a concert and everyone wants to go with her/Junior, Laura, Callie, and Gary start a club but can't agree on anything

programme.title: Spinny Water / Kelp's Song
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Playground / Sparkless
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s "fun-crastinating" puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Doodlebook
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Dollhouse Safari
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Heavy Metal
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders get stuck in a cave with their rival, Magnus, during a race to find a new source of an important mineral.

programme.title: Iced Out
programme.desc: Frustrated that she's not fitting in with the team, Aggro goes off on her own with Elbone on a mission to save a dragon egg trapped in ice.

programme.title: You (Don't) Snooze, You Lose / Save The Squasher
programme.desc: When the crew takes on a mission to help Ian get some rest for a Badminton Tournament, Jax realises that the biggest approach isn't always the best approach. / When Lula loses her comic book, Ari learns that the best heroes rely on teamwork and not gadgets.

programme.title: The Banana Bread Burglar / Finding Meow Meow
programme.desc: When the banana bread Harper leaves out for Eden is stolen, the Dew Drops create a sting operation to catch the thief. / When Captain Meow Meow gets a splinter in his paw and hears the word "vet," he flees. Now it's up to the Dew Drops to find Captain Meow Meow and get that splinter out.

programme.title: Pupcakes \ Stink or Swim
programme.desc: When Tag discovers that Scooch is a great baker, she encourages him to start a pupcake stand. But when Tag rounds up more customers than Scooch is prepared to handle, Scooch can’t keep up with the demand. \ Tag and Scooch’s race to pick up the most trash on Pawston Beach is thwarted by Frank and Beans, who just want to make more of a mess.

programme.title: A Ball-For-All
programme.desc: It's Ball-entine’s Day, the day when the dogs of Pawston show their affection for each other by exchanging balls. But unfortunately, the town is fresh out, so Tag and Scooch set sail for Ball Island. \ If Tag and Scooch want to leave Ball Island with the balls they chose for their family, they must earn them by proving themselves ball-worthy, through a series of challenges from The Fetcher.

programme.title: Doodlebook
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Dollhouse Safari
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Stuff / Campout
programme.desc: When Kelp and Scallop discover Mr. Pearly has a cave full of stuff they help him to realize it could help a lot of other sea creatures. / When the group goes camping, Kelp helps Ollie learn that even though it didn’t go exactly as planned, they can still have loads of fun.

programme.title: Family Trip / Great Great Grandicorn
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop help Dad discover the true meaning of family trips. / When the Great Great Grandicorn comes to visit, the kids learn that making mistakes is part of learning.

programme.title: Heavy Metal
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders get stuck in a cave with their rival, Magnus, during a race to find a new source of an important mineral.

programme.title: Iced Out
programme.desc: Frustrated that she's not fitting in with the team, Aggro goes off on her own with Elbone on a mission to save a dragon egg trapped in ice.

programme.title: Flynt
programme.desc: Ty gets jealous when a Hydrodon named Flynt becomes everyone's new hero, but when a blazing fire heads towards the ravine, Ty must ask Flynt for help

programme.title: Lucky and the Jam Jam
programme.desc: The PALs try to figure out why Marciela is acting so weird, while Miradero is gripped by April Fool’s Day fever

programme.title: Akila Says No
programme.desc: When Brian and Cleo try to get Akila to say "no", they find themselves face to face with the galaxy’s grossest outlaws, the scavengers.

programme.title: Team Building
programme.desc: Ceo, Akila, and Brian must demonstrate they make a great team so Khepra doesn’t split them up.

programme.title: The First Picture Show
programme.desc: When Thunk invents the first-ever movie using shadow puppets, everyone in Ahhh! Valley loves it...until they are shocked by the ending.

programme.title: Caved And Confused
programme.desc: When Grug and Ugga leave the kids alone on date night, Eep throws the first-ever house party that rages out of control and almost destroys the cave.

programme.title: In Dragons We Trust
programme.desc: After the dragons of Berk are blamed for an outbreak of crime, Hiccup is determined to find out what’s really going on before the dragons are exiled.

programme.title: Alvin & the Outcasts
programme.desc: Alvin and the outcast Vikings terrorize Berk, left defenseless without their dragons, and now only Hiccup can bring them back.

programme.title: Defenders Of The Wing Part 1
programme.desc: The Defenders of the Wing are a local island tribe, which worships dragons and believe the Riders have stolen their protector - the Eruptodon dragon.

programme.title: Defenders Of The Wing Part 2
programme.desc: Hiccup, Mala, Astrid, Fishlegs, and Snotlout go searching for the now captured Eruptodon, but little do they know that Viggo has a sinister plan.

programme.title: Gruff Around The Edges
programme.desc: When a distant cousin of the Twins named Gruffnut arrives on Dragon's Edge, Tuffnut tries to impress him, but Gruffnut may not be the hero he seems.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: Boss and family go on Spring Break to visit his grandparents in the big city of Chicago. Boss uses the trip to test his business mettle, by getting in a promotion war at a real big adult company. And when a department store refuses to let Gigi and Tim return an item, they wind up unionizing the entire sales force.

programme.title: Baby Boss
programme.desc: Mom and Dad are panicking after Gigi noticed Boss isn't growing, so Boss "puts himself under", taking a special formula that will turn him int a regular baby long enough to pass a Doctor's checkup. However, with Boss gone, all the villains from this season see it as the perfect time to strike Baby Corp, leaving Staci to hold the floodgates.

programme.title: Boom Baby
programme.desc: Looking to trim costs, Boss unknowingly fires Boom Baby, a super-undercover Baby Corp worker who displays to parents how unsafe things are by pratfalling on them and crying for attention. Convinced he's the victim of a conspiracy, Boom leaves a wake of parent worry in his path, forcing Boss to stop him.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Frenzied Farts of Flabby Flabulous
programme.desc: George and Harold create a comic book about their gym teacher, but after a freak accident turns fantasy into reality, the best friends must run from his revenge

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Dreadful Debacle of DJ Drowsy Drawers
programme.desc: George and Harold attempt to save the fun at their school dance, but matters are made worse when their music teachers transforms into the dull yet deadly villain DJ Drowsy Drawers

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Horrible Hostilities of the Homework Hydra
programme.desc: When George and Harold go back in time to stop the invention of homework, they realize they also eliminated the most important thing in the world: comic books

programme.title: Midnight Scrum
programme.desc: When Viggo puts a bounty on Hiccup's head, every Dragon Hunter in the world is after capturing Hiccup, so Toothless and the Riders must rescue him.

programme.title: Not Lout
programme.desc: When Snotlout screws up a mission, he must learn to be a leader and earn the trust of the other riders.

programme.title: Saving Shattermaster
programme.desc: When Mala and the Defenders of the Wing find a mysterious stranger who looks suspiciously like Dagur, Hiccup and Heather go to investigate.

programme.title: Big Trouble in Panda Village
programme.desc: The kids must leave Po to escape into the forest and head back to Panda Village to prepare against Jindiao

programme.title: Secrets Lost to Shadow
programme.desc: The kids meet an unlikely ally when trying to find Po

programme.title: Out of the Cave and Onto Thin Ice
programme.desc: After a shocking revelation, Po is determined to get his chi back and Jing decides to face Jindiao

programme.title: To Catch A Changeling
programme.desc: After Jim finds the Killahead Bridge has been moved, he must use a horseshoe to find who in Arcadia is a changeling.

programme.title: Adventures In Trollsitting
programme.desc: Jim finds a Changeling when babysiting for Claire & finally has proof for Trollmarket but can't tell Claire; Meanwhile AAARRRGGHH!! moves in with Toby.

programme.title: Bittersweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Jim is excited to test-drive a Vespa for his birthday but things quickly go awry when he must fight Bular's flying Vulture Troll sent to hunt him down.

programme.title: Born a Toretto
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon S13

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱新来的医生张志明精明能干，深得一妍赏识，一妍更委任他为肺肝同步移植手术的换肝主刀医生。以珈向董事会成员杏芳与袁添维争取主席之位的选票，却不果。一妍的腕管综合症越来越严重，但她为了手术可如期进行而隐瞒病情。原来当年一妍曾收到匿名告密信，指多年前立万有份执刀的肺肝同步移植手术，是因负责肝移植部份的杨旭川医生失误导致病人死亡

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明闯入叶凌霜的闭关处，发现她在尝试解开封印并陷入了幻境。叶凌霜被唤醒后对彧修明大发雷霆，责怪他利用夜北百姓作为牺牲品。随后，叶凌霜被彧修明打入天牢，但很快又被放出并恢复职位。在朝堂上，彧修明借叶凌霜之口警示朝臣，并定下规矩。后来彧修明邀请叶凌霜陪同巡狩，最初被拒绝，但叶凌霜在得知七海伶未死的消息后改变主意，并成功说服彧修明让她随行。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 满月借助社团追杀永源，惟家朗及时赶到，令身受重伤的永源逃之夭夭……家朗想起满月曾在现场附近出现，对她起疑。曦晨在医院醒来后，得知满月独自背负一切，决要全力支持她。基俊的桃色绯闻险曝光，幸芳要慧云做好门面功夫。满月献计，为慧云筹办惊喜派对，基俊不爽与慧云对质……满月被基俊为难，幸得成风出手解围。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】永成的儿子柯睿晖替明塱慈善基金表演筹款，永成发现后到场要拉走睿晖，导致睿晖惊恐症发作，幸得启心助他平伏。永成要启澄、建邦加入明塱医疗城专案小组，为他争取好处。启澄、建邦找秀琳出面，以主席选票作交换，让一妍答应两人加入专案小组。杏芳提到明塱将实行加工时减福利的优化计划，英杰不满并提出质疑。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明拒绝了大臣将叶凌霜纳入后宫的建议，并与她一同出发巡狩。期间，叶凌霜将云纹托付给顾惘然照看。在巡狩过程中，彧修明揭露了中州大都护蔡骖的违法行为。蔡骖因此计划反叛，试图在枕霞山切断彧修明的救兵后杀了他。然而，彧修明早有准备，他和叶凌霜一起面对险境。在蔡军围攻枕霞山时，叶凌霜决定留下坚守，而彧修明则下山求援。

programme.title: Delphine Boulay Case: Terror at the Scout Camp
programme.desc: August 1988. Delphine, 9 years old, leaves with her brother for a scout camp near Deauville. Holidays that will quickly turn into a nightmare. One night, while she was supposed to be sleeping peacefully in her tent, Delphine disappeared. Her lifeless body would be found a few days later.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2

programme.title: Abuela's Quinceanera / Story Time
programme.desc: Dora finds out that her Abuela never had a quinceańera and throws her a super-secret surprise party with a special dress, tiara, and shoes! // Dora's friend Coco doesn't have a story for Story Time, so they go to the Tall Tale Tree in search of one!

programme.title: Run Cynthia Run / Dora In Space
programme.desc: Dora and Boots get help from Carmelo the Condor to fix their friend's running shoes in time for the rainforest race! // Dora and Boots rescue Tico from space after his spaceship falls apart!

programme.title: The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: The Treasure Hunt / Going into the Wild
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: Hiccupism / Silence please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: Where Did It Go Barbabravo? / The Big Bad Hen
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Sea Wall
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose asks Rubble & Crew to fix the bridge to Bear Island. But when Speed Meister intervenes, the pups have to clean up his mess and protect the bears from a rapidly approaching storm... with help from Auntie Crane's new Bark Yard Zoomer!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Super Mega Movie Screen / The Crew Builds An Auntie Day Present
programme.desc: A new Super Squirrely Whirly movie is playing at the drive-in theater! But when Speed Meister gets in the way, the pups spring into action to save the day. // It's Auntie Day! But can the pups finish building their present for Auntie Crane in time?

programme.title: Pups Save an Elephant Family / Pups and the Mischievous Kittens
programme.desc: The pups' road trip through the savanna becomes a mission to reunite and rescue an elephant family! // To win the Spotless Town award, the PAW Patrol pups must save Adventure Bay from Mayer Humdinger's Kitten Catastrophe Crew!

programme.title: Pups Save a Friend / Pups Save a Stowaway
programme.desc: When Marshall decides to take a break from the PAW Patrol, the pups jump into action to bring him back! // When the pups find a stowaway on their trip to the Icy Tundra, they must rescue a run-away kitty on a run-away Snow Cat!

programme.title: Relay Tales / The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: Greedyguts / Where is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: New Rocket
programme.desc: Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him.

programme.title: Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Treasure
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure.

programme.title: The Crew Raises A Runway / The Crew Builds A Giant Skateboard
programme.desc: When Buttons the deer needs to cross the Builder Cove airport's runway, Rubble & Crew know just what to build // Rubble & Crew build a supersized skateboard for Auntie Crane and River's show. But when it rolls out of control, the pups lead the chase!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Post Office / The Crew Builds A Super Farm Animal Wash
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office! But when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution. // Rubble & Crew use their construction skills to convert the super car wash and clean Farmer Zoe's sticky farm animals.

programme.title: Friendaversary Adventure / Swiper's Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Boots and Dora journey to Banana Hill to bring Isa a Friendiversary gift - a flowerpot that Boots painted himself! // Dora and friends throw Swiper a surprise birthday party. On the way to the party, Swiper attempts to swipe his own surprise present.

programme.title: Deep Sea Grand Prix
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Blaze and AJ are racing under the ocean! Blaze transforms into a submarine and speeds through sunken ships and coral reefs to reach the giant sand castle at the finish line!

programme.title: Tooth On The Loose / Scaredy Croc
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: The Birth / The Revelation
programme.desc: Young Francois witnesses the birth of Barbapapa. // Barbapapa is a prisoner in a zoo.

programme.title: Explorer / Happy Parky / Storm
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Flying Robot Rescue
programme.desc: When Crusher's robot sends Crusher and Pickle far-far away, it's up to Robot Blaze and Robot Sparkle to rescue them using coding!

programme.title: The Ice Treasure
programme.desc: After discovering an ice road that leads to a giant ice treasure, Blaze, AJ, Watts and Gabby go an adventure to find out what's inside! But to get to the treasure, they'll have to dodge all of Crusher's chilly cheats along the way!

programme.title: The Crew Cooks Up A Community Soup
programme.desc: When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Roller Coaster/The Crew Builds Motor A Play Space
programme.desc: When Speed Meister's rollercoaster sends a pet playdate out of control, Rubble & Crew save the day with a bigger, better, and safer coaster. // The Bark Yard safety inspection is today! But will Motor go boom and cost the Crew a gold safety star?

programme.title: Pups Stop a Big Leak/Pups Save a Baby Anteater/Pups Save a Hatch Day/Pups Save the Munchie Mobile
programme.desc: The Pups rescue Francois from a water tower geyser. // The Pups rescue a baby anteater stuck on a bucking RoboHorse. // The Pups rescue Ace and her special delivery for Chickaletta's party. // The Pups rescue Mr. Porter and his stranded Food Truck.

programme.title: Liberty Makes a New Friend / Pups Save the Pup Pup Boogie Contest
programme.desc: Liberty mistakenly brings a bear into town, thinking it's someone's pet. She must fix her mistake and rescue Chickaletta. // Francois' hot-air balloon goes out of control before the Pup Pup Boogie Contest. The Pups, with Liberty, race to the rescue.

programme.title: Wonky Wishing Wand / Bip Bip's Big Show
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken's magic goes wonky and not only shrinks himself, but causes wacky things to happen throughout the rainforest. Dora has to fix it! // Bip Bip has a concert with Tico, but he's lost! Dora and Boots have to get him to the show on time.

programme.title: The Great Abuela Cookoff
programme.desc: After the Pokey Pigeons eat all of Abuela's elotes, Dora and Boots set out to find more ingredients for the Great Abuela Cook-off.

programme.title: Treasure
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure.

programme.title: Roar
programme.desc: It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town.

programme.title: Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: Muddy Festival
programme.desc: Peppa and her family sleep overnight in a tent and wake up to find the whole festival is covered in mud. Peppa is thrilled!

programme.title: Strawberries
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig have been growing strawberries to make jam, but the birds have eaten them all! Instead, they go with Peppa and George to Miss Rabbit's strawberry farm.

programme.title: Grandpa Pig's Birthday
programme.desc: It is Grandpa Pig's birthday and the family go out for a special birthday meal. Peppa has never been to a restaurant before.

programme.title: The Petting Farm
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit Mrs Badger's petting farm where they meet lots of little animals and learn it's important to wash your hands.

programme.title: Buttercups, Daisies and Dandelions
programme.desc: Cousin Chloe, Peppa and George are picking flowers, making daisy-chains and transforming George into a fearsome dandy-lion.

programme.title: The Marble Run
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Rebecca and Richard Rabbit have so much fun playing with their marble run. When Daddy Pig joins in, the marble run gets much bigger!

programme.title: Grandpa Pig's Metal Detector
programme.desc: When George loses his new toy robot's metal key, Grandpa Pig uses his metal detector to find it. They also find a lot of other things on the way!

programme.title: World Book Day
programme.desc: It is World Book Day at playgroup but Peppa has so many favourite books she just cannot decide which to go as!

programme.title: Children's Festival
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy go on a trip to the children's festival where there is lots of singing, dancing, making crafts and listening to stories.

programme.title: Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: Borrower Daisy / Can Do Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy try to figure out which of her friends borrowed her game and didn't return it. // A perfect "Step-Mother's" day for Maggie all depends on Daisy and Mr. Crocodile finding a can opener.

programme.title: Meatball Mayhem
programme.desc: When Crusher accidentally knocks a bottle of "grow spice" onto a meatball, it grows to an enormous size and rolls away! It's up to Blaze and Pickle to transform into robots and stop the meatball before it wrecks the entire town!

programme.title: Robots in Space
programme.desc: When Space Commander Megan is marooned on Pluto, our robot heroes will race through wormholes, shoot past ice volcanoes, and blast straight through an asteroid field to bring their new friend back home.

programme.title: The Crew Cooks Up A Community Soup
programme.desc: When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Bowling Alley / The Crew Builds A Superbloom Path
programme.desc: Rubble & the pups find Grandpa Gravel's lucky bowling ball. Too bad Builder Cove doesn't have a bowling alley... until now! // When a sudden superbloom traps Motor, Lily, and Park Ranger Rose, the pups need a flower-friendly construction solution.

programme.title: Pups Save a Blimp / Pups Save a Chili Cook-Out
programme.desc: Capn' Turbot's weather blimp is taken by Mayor Humdinger who plans ot use it to change the weather in Foggy Bottom. // Mr. Porter's stove explodes right before the Chilli cook-off.

programme.title: Pups Save a Melon Festival / Pups Save A Cow
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's plan to win the giant melon contest goes off the rails when his "melon" bounces away, causing chaos all over town! // When Farmer Al's truck gets stuck on a broken bridge, it's up to the pups to lower them to safety!

programme.title: Greedyguts / Where is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: Barbabright Has a Secret / Super Duper Cool
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: Spaceland / New Rocket / Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Dora And Diego and the Big Boy Bears! / Journey to Lizard Island
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Diego help a pair of spectacled bear brothers build an awesome nest for their Mami! // Dora, Boots, and Diego help a lost, baby lizard get home to its parents!

programme.title: The Secret Pyramid / Abuela Adventure Day
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Mami search for magical gems and a secret pyramid with their new friend, Patli! // Dora and friends save their Abuelas in time to celebrate Abuela Adventure Day!

programme.title: Teddy's Day Out
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are having a picnic. Mr Zebra the Postman and Zoe Zebra are having a picnic too, so they decide to have one big picnic. When it's home time, Peppa leaves her teddy behind.

programme.title: Emily Elephant
programme.desc: There's a new pupil at the playgroup, Emily Elephant. Everybody wants to be her friend because she is very good at building blocks and can make a loud noise with her trunk.

programme.title: George's Friend
programme.desc: George and Rebecca Rabbit's little brother Richard each have a toy dinosaur but they are not very good at sharing their toys. Mummy Pig shows them that they can have much more fun at the playground if they play together, just like their big sisters.

programme.title: The Boat Pond
programme.desc: Peppa and her family and friends are playing at the pond with their toy boats. Everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit. Daddy Pig makes Rebecca a boat out of newspaper. Rebecca's paper boat is so nice; everyone wants one.

programme.title: Mr Scarecrow
programme.desc: The birds keep eating the seeds from Grandpa Pig's flower garden. Peppa and George make a scarecrow, which stops the birds from eating. But Peppa is worried that the birds are hungry, so Granny Pig gives the birdies a birdfeeder with their own seeds.

programme.title: The Time Capsule
programme.desc: Peppa and her school friends are making a time capsule. They each put one of their favourite things inside and bury it in the school garden. The children discover that their parents made a time capsule many years ago.

programme.title: Recycling
programme.desc: Peppa and George help Mummy Pig tidy up the breakfast things. Mummy Pig tells them that bottles go into a special green box to be recycled. Old newspapers go in a red box and tins go in a blue box. Peppa and George have fun filling the boxes.

programme.title: Abra-Ka-Pickle!
programme.desc: Pickle is putting on a magic show for all of Axle City! But when Crusher accidentally makes a magical mistake, it's up to Blaze and Pickle to fix the magic and save their friends! Abra-ka-Pickle!

programme.title: Pups Save Apollo / Pups Save the Hippos
programme.desc: Apollo the Super Pup comes to Adventure Bay, in Rubble's dream. The pups must rescue their super hero! // Raimundo's dancing hippos shake, rattle, and roll the big top down. The Paw Patrol rebuild just in time for the big show!

programme.title: Pups Save a Rubble-Double
programme.desc: Rubble dreams that he's been taken aboard a spaceship and meets his alien double. When the ship crashes on an alien planet, he needs help.

programme.title: The Crew Cooks Up A Community Soup
programme.desc: When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Alphorn
programme.desc: Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: Cluc Croc / One Tree Home
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile joins gymnastics club because Daisy loves it. // Mr. Crocodile and Daisy help Gigi and Roland find separate homes when they don't want to share a tree anymore.

programme.title: Bbarbalalalalalala / The Biodisaster
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: Spaceland
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre.

programme.title: Swimming
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are at the swimming pool. Rebecca Rabbit is there too. She and Peppa are very proud of their swimming skills. Everyone is surprised to discover that Daddy Pig is very good at swimming and diving. Very good indeed.

programme.title: Foggy Day
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig are taking Peppa and George to play in the playground. On the way it gets a bit foggy, and soon it is so foggy they can't see. They decide to go home. But which way is home?

programme.title: Recycling
programme.desc: Peppa and George help Mummy Pig tidy up the breakfast things. Mummy Pig tells them that bottles go into a special green box to be recycled. Old newspapers go in a red box and tins go in a blue box. Peppa and George have fun filling the boxes.

programme.title: The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: Summer Camp I
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island.

programme.title: Gasquatch
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are deep in the woods when they discover and befriend a mud-loving monster truck named Gasquatch. Now, they must set out on an epic adventure to bring their new friend to Mud Fest... the muddiest party of all time.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: Backpack's Charm / Lost Banana Blankie
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Backpack find her lost friendship charm and make it even better than before! // Dora helps Boots find his lost banana blankie before it's bedtime at the sleepover party!

programme.title: Clock and Dance / Barbapileup
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: Greedyguts / Where is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.desc: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of a player who excelled that particular year. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both the player and his club.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: I left here as a boy and I'm definitely coming back as a man. With 25 goals in Aston Villa's promotion-winning Championship season in 2018/19, Tammy Abraham still holds a special place in the hearts of Villa fans. Having risen through the ranks at Chelsea but then moved on by Thomas Tuchel, a determination to succeed saw him win plaudits wherever he played - For Roma and AC Milan in Serie A and lately for Besiktas, but Abraham has unfinished business in the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We speak to Dimitar Berbatov, a player whose elegance and composure left a lasting imprint on English football. Focusing on his Premier League years, we follow his rise at Tottenham Hotspur, where his effortless style first captivated fans, through to his trophy-laden spell at Manchester United, where moments of brilliance were often matched by intense scrutiny.

programme.title: WHU v ARS
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2015/2016 season.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: During a stop at the superstore Shoppe, Ben and Gwen are transformed into babies by nanny-gone-nuts Nanny Nightmare, who will stop at nothing to reshape the world in the image of her day care.

programme.title: Strokes Of Genius
programme.desc: Comedic superstars Ali Wong and Randall Park swing by the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire Challenge tasking the chefs to make the wackiest fried rice they can. Then, the chefs head to the famed Getty Museum to seek inspiration from one of four historical art movements to create a masterpiece on their plate. Guest Judge Ludo Lefebvre joins Tom, Padma and Gail, as well as guest diners Chefs Ray Garcia, Sara Hymanson, Sarah Kramer and Craig Thornton.

programme.title: Stinky Love
programme.desc: Kimchi whisks one of Mung's smelliest dishes away to a romantic setting on top of the catering company.

programme.title: Certifrycation Class
programme.desc: When Mung is forced to spend the day in Chef Certifrycation school, he butts heads with a fickle instructor.

programme.title: Sing Beans
programme.desc: In order to cook the performing food Sing Beans, the gang has to stay up all night as the dish cooks.

programme.title: Grubble Gum
programme.desc: Chowder is forced to swallow his new gum before Truffles finds out he didn't buy enough to share. Soon all of Marzipan City ends up in a very sticky situation.

programme.title: The Cinnamini Monster
programme.desc: When Chowder discovers a lonely monster in the forest, the whole gang soon has to find a way to escape from their emotionally needy new 'friend'.

programme.title: The Devil And Li'l D
programme.desc: Li'l D dreams of signing a record deal come true.

programme.title: Funky Monkey
programme.desc: Li'l D plots to get into the upper class' production.

programme.title: Eddie's Money
programme.desc: Eddie and Li'l D embark on a mystery tour.

programme.title: Ben 24hrs
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen attempt to stay up all night for Adrenaland but Ben fails to utilise his alien powers to stay awake and starts causing disaster after disaster.

programme.title: Freaky Gwen Ben
programme.desc: Ben interferes with malicious magician Hex's quest for the Titan Gloves at a flea market and accidentally switches bodies with Gwen, forcing him to walk a mile in her shoes and vice-versa!

programme.title: Rustbucket Rip
programme.desc: During a tour of historic Oldeville, Ben finds a rare Sumo Slammers card. When Billy Billions claims the same card, Ben has to battle Billy's high-tech drones which have hijacked the Rust Bucket!

programme.title: The Clocktopus
programme.desc: In a peaceful coastal town, Ben must not only face the archaic antagonist Steam Smythe and his latest creation - the Clocktopus - but also his deepest, darkest fear: squid!

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Deathly Hallows - Part 1
programme.desc: Harry, Ron and Hermione leave Hogwarts behind on a mission to destroy the Horcruxes, the secrets to Voldemort's power and immortality.

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Deathly Hallows - Part 2
programme.desc: The time has come, the fate foretold in the prophecy draws near: the confrontation to the death between Harry Potter and Lord Voldemort.

programme.title: Villain Time
programme.desc: Ben must turn alien to save the Hoover Dam from disaster, but when tough guy hero Tim Buktu swoops in to 'help', Ben must figure out if Tim is friend or foe.

programme.title: Something I Ate
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max go on a tour of the impervious Fort Knox, but when Dr. Animo incites a hungry ani-mutate to attack the Fort, Ben must stop it before it gobbles up the nation's monetary standard!

programme.title: Don't Let The Bass Drop
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen are excited to attend an Earth Day EDM concert in Portland until the show is hijacked by the sound-manipulating baddy, Lord Decibel, who uses sound as a weapon to trash the planet.

programme.title: Cutting Corners
programme.desc: Ben approaches Geezer Bob about doing a little yard work to earn spending money and accidentally draws the ire of Bob's gnome-neighbours: the tiny, terrifyingly tenacious Billy-Bob Goblins.

programme.title: Animo Farm
programme.desc: Ben stumbles into Dr. Animo's secret lab - now ruled by his superior mutants, the Alphas - and must help the lesser animals escape while stuck as 'Stinkfly'.

programme.title: The Wrong Address
programme.desc: During a seemingly normal delivery, Chowder's gut instincts lead him and Mung on a non-stop adventure.

programme.title: The Wrong Customer
programme.desc: An unexpected outlaw unwittingly turns the catering company into his hideout.

programme.title: Burple Nurples
programme.desc: When Chowder unknowingly fills a dish with poison, Mung must spend the day keeping the tainted food away from the citizens of Marzipan City.

programme.title: Shnitzel Makes A Deposit
programme.desc: Payday is always Shnitzel's favorite day. But it becomes the worst day of his life when he's forced to take Chowder along to the bank.

programme.title: Gazpacho Stands Up
programme.desc: Chowder gives Gazpacho a hand in preparing for his big comedy debut. But Chowder's poor penmanship threatens to turn the situation from funny to failure.

programme.title: Brotha From The Third Rock
programme.desc: Phil's efforts to prove aliens exist land him in trouble.

programme.title: Westley Side Story
programme.desc: The Westley kids are challenged to a music competition.

programme.title: Am I Blue?
programme.desc: Philly Phil's latest invention turns the kids blue.

programme.title: I Wish I Got The Credit I Deserve
programme.desc: Daniel struggles to understand his daughter's new vocation. Ruby embarks on a scientific wish that helps bring them both to a meeting of the minds.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: "The Wild Robot" follows Rozzum 7134, a futuristic robot that washes ashore on a deserted island.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: This star-packed extravaganza brings the comic book legend to the big screen where an infant superhero is sent to Earth just as his home planet, Krypton, explodes.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: Superman returns after five years in space to find Lois engaged and Lex Luthor with a sinister plan that will endanger America.

programme.title: You're So Fresh!
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson drops into the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire based on her new movie, Trolls: World Tour, where the chefs are tasked with combining colorful ingredients from six different musical 'lands' to make one delicious dish. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs are split into two teams to create a cohesive, progressive vegetarian meal for Padma, Tom, Gail and James Beard nominated guest judge Jeremy Fox.

programme.desc: Ben must turn alien to save the Hoover Dam from disaster, but when tough guy hero Tim Buktu swoops in to 'help', Ben must figure out if Tim is friend or foe.

programme.title: Something I Ate
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max go on a tour of the impervious Fort Knox, but when Dr. Animo incites a hungry ani-mutate to attack the Fort, Ben must stop it before it gobbles up the nation's monetary standard!

programme.title: Don't Let The Bass Drop
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen are excited to attend an Earth Day EDM concert in Portland until the show is hijacked by the sound-manipulating baddy, Lord Decibel, who uses sound as a weapon to trash the planet.

programme.title: Cutting Corners
programme.desc: Ben approaches Geezer Bob about doing a little yard work to earn spending money and accidentally draws the ire of Bob's gnome-neighbours: the tiny, terrifyingly tenacious Billy-Bob Goblins.

programme.title: Animo Farm
programme.desc: Ben stumbles into Dr. Animo's secret lab - now ruled by his superior mutants, the Alphas - and must help the lesser animals escape while stuck as 'Stinkfly'.

programme.title: The Wrong Address
programme.desc: During a seemingly normal delivery, Chowder's gut instincts lead him and Mung on a non-stop adventure.

programme.title: The Wrong Customer
programme.desc: An unexpected outlaw unwittingly turns the catering company into his hideout.

programme.title: Burple Nurples
programme.desc: When Chowder unknowingly fills a dish with poison, Mung must spend the day keeping the tainted food away from the citizens of Marzipan City.

programme.title: Shnitzel Makes A Deposit
programme.desc: Payday is always Shnitzel's favorite day. But it becomes the worst day of his life when he's forced to take Chowder along to the bank.

programme.title: Gazpacho Stands Up
programme.desc: Chowder gives Gazpacho a hand in preparing for his big comedy debut. But Chowder's poor penmanship threatens to turn the situation from funny to failure.

programme.title: You're So Fresh!
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson drops into the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire based on her new movie, Trolls: World Tour, where the chefs are tasked with combining colorful ingredients from six different musical 'lands' to make one delicious dish. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs are split into two teams to create a cohesive, progressive vegetarian meal for Padma, Tom, Gail and James Beard nominated guest judge Jeremy Fox.

programme.title: Brotha From The Third Rock
programme.desc: Phil's efforts to prove aliens exist land him in trouble.

programme.title: Westley Side Story
programme.desc: The Westley kids are challenged to a music competition.

programme.title: Am I Blue?
programme.desc: Philly Phil's latest invention turns the kids blue.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Follow the minion trio as they venture out into the world to find a new evil boss for their brethren to follow.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: A Superman who's driven by compassion and an inherent belief in the goodness of humankind.

programme.title: Riding The Storm Out
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen's camping trip is interrupted by the emotionless Weatherheads. But a malfunctioning Omnitrix, firing out a mishmash of aliens, may not be the forecast for success.

programme.title: Need For Speed
programme.desc: Touring Yellowstone, Ben uncovers a plot by the fast and furious LaGrange to find treasure buried below the national park. But with Old Faithful's help, Overflow is able to douse LaGrange's dreams.

programme.title: Brief Career Of Lucky Girl
programme.desc: When a wizard cosplayer gets his hands on a real, magical wand at Comic Con, Ben enlists Gwen to help stop Hex from retrieving it.

programme.title: Waterfilter
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max's trip to Niagara Falls is cut short by the horrid Hydromanders - creatures menacing them and their fellow tourists.

programme.title: Shhh!
programme.desc: While relaxing at a monastery with a no-noise policy, Ben can't keep quiet and accidentally awakens a dangerous dragon hidden in a secret chamber below the hallowed halls.

programme.title: A Taste Of Marzipan
programme.desc: When Mung and Ms. Endive unveil the same dish at Marzipan City's biggest food fair, it's an all out war to decide whose is better.

programme.title: The Puckerberry Overlords
programme.desc: When a sour berry sends Chowder on a strange journey into his own mouth, he finds himself on a mission to save his taste buds from some tart invaders.

programme.title: The Elemelons
programme.desc: When Truffles' bad temper causes Mung's fruit creatures to stop making juice, he locks her up with an ultimatum: make friends with them or never get out.

programme.title: Sniffleball
programme.desc: Feeling Chowder's been spending too long in the kitchen, Mung forces him to play with the other kids. Beset by kisses and taunts, he tries to escape.

programme.title: Mung On The Rocks
programme.desc: Truffles gives Mung the cold shoulder after he forgets their 450th wedding anniversary. With Mung too sad to cook, Chowder must take action.

programme.title: Prank Yankers
programme.desc: Tamika's tries to impress two popular older girls.

programme.title: Mini Mentors
programme.desc: Sunny has to perform for his old school teacher and mentor.

programme.title: Too Cool For School
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: I Wish I Could Stop Pretending
programme.desc: Ruby helps bring a long-kept secret to light and changes a life. Daniel meets a business developer interested in Emerald whom he tries to win over.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: A sheltered chameleon with an identity crisis finds himself in a town plagued by bandits and must play the hero to protect it.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: Scooby and the gang face their biggest, most challenging mystery ever, a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: Urkel Saves Santa: The Movie!
programme.desc: The brilliant but accident-prone Steve Urkel goes to find Santa to help the city rediscover the holiday spirit.

programme.title: Bring Your Loved One To Work
programme.desc: In the Quickfire, it's a true test of communication as the chefs play a game of telephone with their loved ones as they try to reproduce the dish their family member is currently eating at a nearby restaurant. Then, the chefs are tasked with creating a signature product that they will bottle, use on a dish and sell at a food festival. They may get help from their visiting loved ones, but for one chef, the help won't save them from being sent home.

programme.title: 唐人街探案2
programme.desc: 唐仁（王宝强饰）为巨额奖金欺骗秦风（刘昊然饰）到纽约参加世界名侦探大赛，比赛的内容是寻找杀害纽约唐人街教父七叔的孙子的凶手。两人再次组合侦破案件，并冒着生命危险闹翻纽约。

programme.title: 妻子的浪漫旅行6
programme.desc: 一档以爱与理解为精神内核的夫妻对话真人秀。四对夫妻通过这趟旅行学习和借鉴其他夫妻的相处之道，让夫妻重新审视彼此关系，学会换位思考，达到治愈婚姻的目的。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 你好，星期六
programme.desc: 节目通过新奇多样的环节设置和兼具知识性、趣味性的创意内容，深度展现明星艺能。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 星空下的仁医
programme.desc: 二十年前一宗手术，令两名儿科专科实习医生况丛昕（马国明饰）与许甘枫（郑嘉颖饰）决裂。 时日过去，由于一个特殊的移植手术，他们在安妮公主医院重聚。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理 7
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 综艺大热门

programme.desc: 本季节目以"奋进"为内核，不仅延续了前两季的全景竞演综艺模式，还通过赛制、环节等方面的升级再度强化节目的竞技性。嘉宾们不断挑战、探索，展现男性的奋斗精神和个性魅力。
